title: Presentation at the IAB Workshop on IP Address Geolocation
description: Our work "Rethinking Geolocalization on the Internet" will be presented at the IAB Workshop on IP Address Geolocation 2025.

title: Paper accepted to ACM HotNets 2025
description: Our paper "Rethinking Geolocalization on the Internet" has been accepted and will be presented at HotNets 2025 in Washington D.C., United States.

title: Blog post on Internet Society Pulse
description: A science communication blog post presenting our work, "Rethinking Geolocalization on the Internet".

title: Paper accepted to PoPETs 2026
description: Our paper "SoK: Mapping the Privacy Landscape of Geolocation Ecosystems" has been accepted and will be presented at PoPETs 2026 in Calgary, Canada.

title: Joined IPinfo as a research intern
description: I recently joined IPinfo for a 4-month research internship, working on IPv6 enumeration.
